constraints.description: Defines the conditions under which the grant is applied, specifying operations, principals, and resources associated with the KMS key.

grant_creation_tokens.description: Defines a list of tokens used to identify and authorize the creation of the grant; must be unique within the context of the grant.

grantee_principal.description: Specifies the AWS principal (IAM user, role, or service) that is granted permission to use the KMS key.

key_id.description: Specifies the unique identifier of the KMS key for which the grant is created; must be a valid key ID, ARN, alias name, or alias ARN.

name.description: Unique identifier for the grant, used to refer to the grant in subsequent operations.

operations.description: Defines the list of operations that the grant allows, such as 'Encrypt', 'Decrypt', 'GenerateDataKey', etc. Must match the supported operations for the KMS key.

retire_on_delete.description: Indicates whether the grant should be retired when the resource is deleted; requires the grant token to be provided.

retiring_principal.description: Specifies the principal allowed to retire the grant, such as an AWS service or IAM user/role. Must be a valid AWS principal ARN.
